section1.heading: 1. About Tahawash
section1.body: Tahawash is a self-service carwash payment platform operated in Azerbaijan. By using the app you agree to these terms. The full legally-reviewed version will be published before public launch.

section2.heading: 2. Account and phone verification
section2.body: You authenticate via Azerbaijani mobile number (+994) and SMS one-time code. We rate-limit OTP requests to keep the channel reliable for legitimate users. Each phone number maps to exactly one account.

section3.heading: 3. Payments
section3.body: Payments are processed by ePoint, a licensed PSP in Azerbaijan. Tahawash never sees your full card number. Saved cards are referenced by tokens we cannot decrypt. Charges are non-refundable once the wash bay credits successfully; failed wash sessions are eligible for review via support.

section4.heading: 4. Hardware errors
section4.body: If the wash bay does not start within 30 seconds of a successful payment we mark the transaction as 'Hardware error' and surface a support shortcut. Reach out via WhatsApp — we'll review and refund where appropriate.

section5.heading: 5. Account deletion
section5.body: You can delete your account at any time from Profile → Delete account. Your name, phone, and saved cards are removed within minutes. Past transactions remain in our records (without your identity) for tax compliance.

section1.heading: 1. What we collect
section1.body: Phone number, optional name and language, device push token (when granted), city (when given), and transaction history. We do not collect contacts, calendars, photos, or messages.

section2.heading: 2. Why we collect it
section2.body: Phone is required to authenticate. Push token is used to notify you about payment status and promotions you've opted into. Transaction history powers the History tab and tax-mandated record-keeping.

section3.heading: 3. How we store it
section3.body: Customer data is stored in PostgreSQL on Railway (EU-West region). Tokens are SHA-256 hashed at rest. Card data is held by ePoint, not Tahawash — we only store opaque references.

section4.heading: 4. Sharing
section4.body: We do not sell your data. We share the minimum necessary with ePoint (for payment processing) and Expo / Firebase (for push delivery). Carwash operators see anonymous aggregated metrics about their bays — never your personal information.

section5.heading: 5. Your rights
section5.body: You can delete your account from Profile → Delete account. For requests outside the app (data export, marketing opt-out), contact support on WhatsApp.

errors.badHex: Brand color must be a 6-digit hex like #0E7AE7.

version.title: App version targeting
version.subtitle: Drives the force-update modal on mobile. Apps below the minimum version are blocked on launch until users update.
version.warning: Bumping the minimum version forces every customer on an older build to update before they can wash. Coordinate with App Store / Play Store rollouts before raising it.
version.neverConfigured: Not yet configured. The first save creates the policy.
version.minimumHint: Apps below this are blocked with the force-update modal.

errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save the version policy. Try again.
errors.validation: Check the form — versions must be MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.
errors.minGreaterThanLatest: Minimum version cannot be newer than latest.
errors.notesTooLong: Release notes must be 2000 characters or fewer.

legal.title: Legal documents
legal.subtitle: Versioned Terms of Service and Privacy Policy in AZ / RU / EN. Mobile reads the current published version on launch.
legal.warning: Publishing a new version replaces what every user will see. Mobile falls back to bundled copy until at least one version is published per language.
legal.neverPublished: Not yet published for this language. Mobile shows the bundled copy until the first publish.
legal.editorBody: Each section becomes a card on the mobile legal screen. Headings are bold; bodies are paragraphs. Reorder with the arrows, delete with the trash icon.
legal.heading: Heading
legal.dirtyHintFirst: Publish this as version 1 — it will become the current document on mobile.
legal.dirtyHintWithCurrent: Publishing will create version {{version}} and replace the current one on mobile.
legal.historyBody: Past versions are immutable. Restore any older version to make it the current one again (no new version is created).
legal.historyEmpty: No versions yet — publish the first one above.

errors.validation: Check the form — each section needs a heading and a body.
errors.atLeastOne: At least one section is required.
errors.headingTooLong: Heading must be {{max}} characters or fewer.
errors.bodyTooLong: Body must be {{max}} characters or fewer.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Every super-admin action, tenant self-change, and system job is recorded here. Filter by actor, action prefix, resource, or date range.
audit.empty: No audit log rows match these filters.

expand.noChanges: No `changes` payload recorded for this action.
